issues.detail: Instructions are not specific and may be ambiguous for the agent.
Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Order workflow ASL with retries, Choice, and Parallel fan-out
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a linear ASL chain missing the Retry block, Choice branching, and Parallel branches; treatment includes all three plus the documented Retry fields (IntervalSeconds, MaxAttempts, BackoffRate).

scenarios.name: Human approval step waiting on external callback
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposes an out-of-band callback Lambda but omits the .waitForTaskToken ARN and $$.Task.Token wiring; treatment uses the documented sqs:sendMessage.waitForTaskToken pattern with TimeoutSeconds.
